title: Parole ineligibility
doc_html:
§574.22. Parole ineligibility

            No person committed to the Department of Public Safety and Corrections for an offense committed on or after August 1, 2024, shall be eligible for parole under this Part except a person who satisfies the provisions of R.S. 15:574.4(D), (E), (F), (G), (H), (J), or (K).

            Acts 2024, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 6, §1.
doc_text:
§574.22.  Parole ineligibility
No person committed to the Department of Public Safety and Corrections for an
offense committed on or after August 1, 2024, shall be eligible for parole under this Part
except a person who satisfies the provisions of R.S. 15:574.4(D), (E), (F), (G), (H), (J), or
(K).
Acts 2024, 2
nd
Ex. Sess., No. 6, §1.
